expectations.text: Identifies datediff() missing the required third argument (unit) as a syntax error
expectations.evidence: Correctly identified missing unit argument as critical error

expectations.text: Provides a corrected datediff() call with a unit argument (e.g., 'd')
expectations.evidence: Provided corrected formula with 'd' for days

expectations.text: Notes that '' as the false branch of if() in a calc field will produce blank, not an error
expectations.evidence: No mention of the empty string false branch in if(). Did not flag this nuance.

expectations.text: Does NOT incorrectly flag [enroll_date] or [fu_date] as reference errors (both exist in the field list)
expectations.evidence: Incorrectly flagged fu_date as a cross-event reference error requiring [followup_arm_1][fu_date]. The user explicitly stated fu_date is assigned to the Screening event. This is a fabricated reference error.
